CustomField.description: Controls how NPPatch handles minor address edits (changes to a single address field like Street, City, or Zip). When checked, single-field changes update the existing Address record in place. When unchecked (default), any address change creates a new Address record and marks the previous one as non-default, preserving address history.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Treat single-field address changes as updates to the existing Address record instead of creating a new Address record.
CustomField.label: Simple Address Change Treated as Update
